scripts.build: vp run build:types && vp run build:core
scripts.release:core: vp run check && vp run --filter @lilian1315/create-element test run && vp exec --filter @lilian1315/create-element bumpp -c 'release @lilian1315/create-element@' -t '@lilian1315/create-element@'
scripts.release:types: vp run check && vp exec --filter @lilian1315/elements-writable-properties-types bumpp -c 'release @lilian1315/elements-writable-properties-types@' -t '@lilian1315/elements-writable-properties-types@'
